description: Capability matrix the v0.1 binding publishes. Per PRD-300-R28 / A15 every flag is set truthfully: ssr-walk and concurrent are implemented (true); static-ast (compiler-sfc scanner), streaming (renderToWebStream wiring), suspense (depends on streaming), headless-render, and rsc are follow-up milestones (false). The PRD-302-R20 published target table flips these to true as each milestone lands.
